title: trollius europaeus subsp. globosus
intro: Trollius europaeus subsp. globosus, also known as the Globe-flowered Globe-flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help treat various health conditions. The Globe-flower has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, and its health benefits also include reducing fever and alleviating pain. Trollius europaeus subsp. globosus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried and used as a raw material for medicinal purposes.
